title: Project: Drynox
description: A bunch of deadly items. Don't eat. WIP
body:
A Bunch Of Deadly items... Do NoT EAT THE DRYNOXIPHOLIARS!
STILL W.I.P

HAS REI SUPPORT

# All Recipes You Need To Know

- StunStick

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f222b875c4ffe9e14ae44e3d9259e700183ffc01.png)

- DRYNOXIPHOLIARS

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/242f3cbf8f9056dcf47f1ae82969ea0c3a997594.png)

- potion of DRYNOXIPHOLIAR 

Can be made with a DRYNOXIPHOLIARS in a brewing stand and bottle of water

![DRYNOXIPHOLIAR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f074c2205da62af0674e9687b7d5c776f86f0bc8.png)

- Drynoxian Energy Crystal

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0eee87c029818770d44875a35c7fb1013ddaeba.png)

- Elctic Shard

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f641e67333252669ff7cc9cb7c73c02f1d9005b6.png)

- Drynoxian Ingot 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9311ce23098ebde153ff9760d1bbc6d60c8d0e90.png)

- Armor Can BE Made With Drynoxian ingots and Drynoxipholiars.
- Tools can also be with both.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dceec0a4767d6bb7b3a5357674b6431af50bc27f.png)

- Drynoxipholiar ore has redstone properties

# COMING UP 

More Materials
